title: Asparagus Bacon Pasta
instructions: Boil bow tie pasta in salted water until al dente.
In a wok or heavy skillet, melt butter.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about a minute.
Add Parmesan cheese and bouillon cube(s).
Once the bouillon cube is dissolved, slowly stir in heavy cream and salt & pepper.
Add cooked pasta to the cream sauce and toss until pasta is well covered.
Sprinkle with crumbled bacon, toasted pinenuts, parsley, and Parmesan cheese.
Toss everything together and serve immediately.
notes: Use real butter for best results
